title: SSA Disability Research — Index of Demonstrations, Research, Data, and Employment Support
description: Index/landing page mirrored from SSA's Disability Research site, listing SSA demonstrations (e.g., ICAP, PROMISE, RETAIN, SED), completed research projects (e.g., the cardiovascular and HIV listings updates, WD-FAB), data and surveys (NSCF, OIS, QDD), and employment-support resources, each with links back to ssa.gov. Serves as a navigational catalog of SSA disability-research resources rather than a primary dataset. Useful as an entry point to authoritative SSA studies relevant to disability determination.

source.title: Disability Research (SSA Office of Retirement and Disability Policy)

notes: Computed: this is an index/navigation page (a synthesis of links to SSA demonstrations, research, and data), not a primary published study, so it is tiered Computed per the authoring rules. Markdown scrape of the ssa.gov/disabilityresearch landing page. The page is undated and link contents change over time, so temporal_coverage is omitted. No tabular columns to declare.
